---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new endpoint, signal type, integration, or capability
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: feature-request, needs-triage
assignees: umarisa
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it? Be specific. -->

**Who is the user?** (care platform engineer / care home operator / clinical analyst / other)

**What currently happens without this feature?**

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature. If proposing a new endpoint, describe the expected request/response. -->

**If this is a new API endpoint:**
```
METHOD /v1/proposed-endpoint

Request:
{}

Response:
{}
```

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is this the best option? -->

## Clinical Relevance
<!-- For features related to drift detection or alerts — what is the clinical basis? 
     Include references to studies, clinical protocols, or care evidence if available. -->

## Scope
<!-- Would this be a breaking change? Does it affect the OpenAPI spec? -->

- [ ] Requires OpenAPI spec change
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major version bump)
- [ ] New dependency required
- [ ] Changes auth model

## Priority
<!-- Why should this be prioritised? What is the impact of not having it? -->

---
**Note:** For significant features, please open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/umarisa/behavedrift-api/discussions) first to validate the approach before filing a feature request issue.
